rationale: Test a minimal FlowTune source-level patch path while preserving ABC command compatibility.
candidate_steps: Add a scoped FlowTune source patch artifact
Apply the patch only in an isolated candidate workspace
Run build/smoke and CEC-first implementation comparison before QoR review
expected_effect: Exercise the source-code evolution path without changing benchmark semantics.
invariants: Patch stays inside Flow Agent source scope
QoR is ignored unless CEC passes
risk_hotspots: Patch may fail to apply if source context drifts
risks: A no-op fixture does not prove QoR improvement
rollback_plan: Delete the source patch artifact and regenerate the candidate workspace from baseline sources.
rule_updates: Flow Agent source diffs must apply in an isolated workspace before any build or QoR comparison.
